items.title: Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.description_zh: 具有教学意义的图表 > 令人印象深刻的图表。将任何代码变成您可以探索、搜索和提问的交互式知识图。适用于 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Copilot、Gemini CLI 等。

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.description_zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

items.title: claude-plugins-official
items.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
items.description_zh: 由 Anthropic 管理的官方高品质 Claude 代码插件目录。

items.title: knowledge-work-plugins
items.description: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork
items.description_zh: 主要供知识工作者在 Claude Cowork 中使用的开源插件存储库

items.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
items.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
items.description_zh: 用于改进 Claude 代码行为的单个 CLAUDE.md 文件，源自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察。

items.title: pi
items.description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
items.description_zh: AI 代理工具包：编码代理 CLI、统一 LLM API、TUI 和 Web UI 库、Slack 机器人、vLLM pod

items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展或像 OpenClaw 这样的 Discord 中免费使用 claude-code（支持语音）

items.title: codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.description_zh: Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 和 Hermes Agent 的预索引代码知识图 — 更少的令牌、更少的工具调用、100% 本地化

items.title: multica
items.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
items.description_zh: 开源托管代理平台。将编码代理变成真正的队友 - 分配任务、跟踪进度、复合技能。

items.title: Kronos
items.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
items.description_zh: Kronos：金融市场语言的基础模型

items.title: cmux
items.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents
items.description_zh: 基于 Ghostty 的 macOS 终端，带有垂直选项卡和 AI 编码代理通知

items.title: MiroFish
items.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物
items.description_zh: 一个简单且通用的群体智能引擎，可以预测任何事情。 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

items.title: build-your-own-x
items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
items.description_zh: 通过从头开始重新创建您最喜欢的技术来掌握编程。

items.title: skills
items.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#
items.description_zh: 使用 .NET 和 C# 协助 AI 编码代理的技能存储库

items.title: frigate
items.description: NVR with realtime local object detection for IP cameras
items.description_zh: 具有 IP 摄像机实时本地对象检测功能的 NVR
